notes: Bumped after v0.87.0..v0.88.0 sweep (release 0.88.0). 15 doc files edited + mapping.json (+4 mappings: incidents.ts->reference/api.mdx, softwareDeployment.ts->deployments.mdx, new maintenanceRebootWorker.ts->maintenance-windows.mdx, devices/network page->discovery.mdx).
